elements.text: AD CREATIVE PIPELINE — Full Entry→4:5/9:16 Flow (Every Step)

DASHBOARD UI (app.js / index.html)
POST /api/runs/execute

User uploads:
• product master doc.txt (SSOT)
• mechanism_file (accepted, ignored)
• faq_file (accepted, ignored)
• image_sources.txt (optional)
• input_image_files (JPG/PNG)

Config JSON:
• selected_personas [1..26]
• global_formats [HERO,BA,TEST,FEAT,UGC]
• formats_by_persona map
• language_mode (BOTH/EN/HI)
• hypothesis {type,variant}
• model, opencode_api_url/key
• kie_api_key (optional)

FASTAPI ENTRY (app.py)
api_run_execute() L4078

a) ensure_dirs() — create storage
dirs if missing
b) Parse cfg = json.loads(config)
c) make_run_id() = ts+random
   → dashboard_storage/runs/run_{id}/
d) mkdir: inputs/, logs/, context/
e) save_upload(product master doc.txt)
f) save_upload(image_sources.txt)
g) store_uploaded_input_images()
h) coalesce_path() for defaults
i) resolve_format_plan(cfg) L2740
   • personas × formats → base_plan
   • [{persona, format}, ...]

FORMAT PLAN + HYPOTHESIS (L4113-4124)

expand_plan_with_hypothesis() L2760
• If hyp_type == "none": pass through
• Else inject per-item:
  hyp_meta = {
    type, variable_label,
    variant, hypothesis_id
  }

Hypothesis types (HYPOTHESIS_VARIABLES):
• hook_structure (question_lead,
  proof_lead, contrast_loop,
  confession_lead, command_lead)
• concept_angle (pain_point,
  desired_outcome, social_proof,
  authority, curiosity, comparison,
  offer, story)
• awareness_stage (unaware,
  problem_aware, solution_aware,
  product_aware)
• proof_style (authority_anchor,
  social_proof, mechanism_explainer,
  routine_clarity, objection_flip)
• cta_voice (urgent_start,
  guided_next_step, reassurance_start,
  challenge_action, discovery_action)
• concept_structure (pas,bab,fab,four_us)

→ Saves hypothesis_config.json

PRODUCT CONTEXT EXTRACTION (L4126-4199)

PATH A (PREFERRED — canonical_llm):
scripts/build_canonical_context.py

1. merge_product_directives(product_file)
2. build_prompt() with strict instructions:
   "You are a strict information extraction
   engine. Return ONLY valid JSON.
   Use ONLY product master doc.txt.
   Do not invent facts."
   Schema has 24 canonical buckets:
   • positioning, promise_claims
   • eligibility, exclusions
   • protocol_morning, protocol_night
   • mechanism_allowed_claims
   • mechanism_disallowed_claims
   • contraindications, safety_signals
   • benefit_ladder, proof_anchors
   • on_image_copy_requirements
   • competitor_field, etc.
3. Coverage check: 11 required items
   → missing_required list
   → conflict resolution with risk levels
4. opencode run --pure --attach → LLM
5. normalize_canonical() + build_generation_context()
6. Output: runtime/context_canonical.json
   → product_ctx = generation_context

PATH B (FALLBACK):
extract_product_context.py
→ Rule-based regex: extract position,
   eligibility, mechanism, routine
→ No LLM call needed

CACHE CHECK:
• product_context_cache_key(hash,model)
• If cached: skip both paths
• write_product_context_cache() on success

PER-AD CONTEXT ASSEMBLY (L4201-4284)

For each {persona, format} in plan:

a) parse_persona_library(PLAYBOOK)
b) build_persona_payload(pno) L718
   • 26 PERSONA_SEED_INPUTS (L432-459)
   • pain, desire, friction, proof, tone
   • persona_number, persona_name
   • output: {persona_number, persona_name,
     pain_points, core_message, objections,
     trust_anchors, english_ready, hindi_ready}

c) extract_format_rules.py --format {fmt}
   → Reads AD_CREATIVE_SYSTEM_PLAYBOOK.md
   → Returns format-specific constraints

d) build_copy_requirements() L478
   • Format sequence index tracking
   • Concept variation from hypothesis
   • Headline execution rules injected

e) HYPOTHESIS OVERRIDE (L4228-4257):
   • If hyp active, inject concept:
   → hook_structure_override + guidance
   → concept_angle_guidance
   → awareness_stage_guidance
   → proof_style_override + guidance
   → cta_voice_override + guidance
   → concept_structure_guidance

f) Registry banlist (L4269-4270):
   scripts/registry_banlist.py --last 150
   → Returns buckets of used text

→ Assembles full_context = {
    run_id, language_mode,
    product_context, ads[],
    banlist, ...}
→ Saves run_context.json

LLM COPY GENERATION (L4286-4308)
call_opencode_compatible() L2152

SERVER TYPE DISPATCH:
• server_type == "blackbox": call_blackbox_http()
• else: OpenCode CLI path

OPENCODE PATH — Per-slot iteration (L2230-2354):

SYSTEM PROMPT (L2168-2214, ~47 lines):
1. "Return valid JSON: default_aspect_ratio + ads[]"
2. "Make obesity/weight-loss intent obvious"
3. "Never include price/currency/discount"
4. "BA: no BEFORE/AFTER labels. Write split
   contrast: bullets 1/2=struggle, 3/4=fix"
5. "TEST: first-person review, role attribution"
6. "Headline 5-12 words, one clean idea"
7. "No instructional verbs (Start/Begin/Kickstart)"
8. "No AM/PM timing or protocol mechanics in H"
9. "No component names (OK Liquid/Tab/Powder) in H"
10. "4U writing lens: Useful, Urgent, Unique, Specific"
11. "No AI-slop: unlock, transform, journey,
    revolutionary, holistic, game-changing, etc."
12. "Per-format structure: HERO=support_line,
    BA=bullets≥2, FEAT=bullets≥2, TEST=attrib+trust"
13. "Diversity across same-format slots"
14. "Follow benefit hierarchy: fast visible results
    > cravings > natural safe > homemade fit > ..."
15. "hook_structure_override → headline opening
    pattern (question/proof/contrast/confession/command)"
16. "proof_style_override → trust line shape"
17. "cta_voice_override → CTA voice"
18. "Final editor pass: shorten, remove generic"

USER PAYLOAD per slot:
• build_generation_payload_for_llm() L533
• Includes: product_context, ad persona,
  format_rules, copy_requirements (with
  headline_execution_rules + concept_framework)
• previous_same_format list for diversity

STRICT_SCHEMA_NOTE (L2220):
• persona {number,name,pain_en,desire_en,
  friction_en,proof_needed_en,tone_cue_en,
  pain_hi,...,tone_cue_hi}
• copy.EN/HI: format-specific fields only

EXECUTION:
opencode run --pure --attach {url} --model {m}
--format json {prompt_text}

RETRY LOGIC:
• If candidate is None: retry with strict_schema_note
• hypothesis_mismatch() check (L2331-2341)
  → classify_hook_structure(headline)
  → classify_proof_style(text)
  → classify_cta_voice(cta)
  → If mismatch: REVISION_REQUIRED retry
  → If still mismatch: warning, accept anyway

FALLBACK (if OpenCode fails):
• build_template_copy() L1837
• Deterministic templates using primary_feature_key
  and secondary_feature_key
• Format-specific headline/support/bullets/CTAs

BLACKBOX PATH: call_blackbox_http() L1971
• POST {api_url}/v1/chat/completions
• Same system prompt + per-slot iteration

POST-PROCESSING & QUALITY CHECKS (L4295-4308)

Executed in sequence after LLM returns:

1. normalize_generated_copy() L1716
   • Load template copy as base
   • Match LLM candidates to planned ads
     (by format + persona number/name)
   • Merge LLM headlines, CTAs, support lines,
     bullets, trust lines into template shell
   • shorten_copy_line() to limit lengths
   • strip_ba_panel_label() for BA bullets
   • ensure_testimonial_headline/attribution
   • Preserve hypothesis, headline_angle,
     concept fields from LLM output

2. strip_internal_markers_from_payload() L1307
   • strip_internal_marker(): remove markers
     like [PERSONA:...], [PRICE:...]
   • strip_price_tokens(): remove INR, ₹, etc.
   • context_line: if matches "needs" / "proof
     needed" / "tone cue" / "persona" → clear it
   • Clean empty/irrelevant bullets

3. enforce_unique_ctas() L1388-1416
   • Build blocked set from registry banlist
   • Track seen CTAs across ads
   • For duplicates: replace with format-specific
     variant from CTA_VARIANTS pool
   • Pool: Start Today / See The Shift / etc.

4. scrub_on_image_copy() L1430
   • Remove context_line containing proof notes
   • PROOF_NOTE_MARKERS: "needs", "proof needed",
     "tone cue", "persona", "non-cure", "compliant",
     "weight-support framing"

5. validate_generated_copy_payload() L596-637
   • ads[] must exist, count ≥ planned
   • Every ad must have: format, persona number
   • EN/HI blocks required per ad
   • Format-specific:
     - HERO/UGC: support_line required
     - BA/FEAT: ≥2 bullets
     - TEST: attribution required
   • Check all planned (fmt,persona) keys present
   • On failure → HTTP 502, copy saved to log

→ Output: context/copy_batch.json

PROMPT ASSEMBLY — scripts/generate_ads.py main() L1251

INPUT: --copy-file copy_batch.json, --language-mode BOTH/EN/HI

STEP A — COPY VALIDATION + UNIQUENESS (L1268-1350):
• Validate every ad: format, aspect_ratio, persona (all 10 fields),
  resolve_concept_fields(), copy block for each render language
• Format field req check: HERO/UGC → support_line, BA/FEAT → bullets≥2, TEST → attribution+trust_line
• In-batch duplicate detection: run_all_text set, collisions[]
• Registry uniqueness: uniqueness_check() headline, CTA,
  support_line, bullets, trust_line against used_text
• If collisions && !skip_uniqueness_check → RuntimeError

STEP B — DETERMINE OUTPUT BATCH (L1352-1362):
• batch_name = args.batch or next_batch_name(output/) → v{next}
• batch_dir = output/v{NN}/
• mkdir 45/ and 96/ subdirs

STEP C — PER AD PROMPT RENDERING (L1365-1437):

   C1. RESOLVE ASPECT RATIO (L1367-1369):
   • ad.aspect_ratio or payload.default_aspect_ratio or "4:5"
   • ratio_dir = batch_dir / "45" or "96"

   C2. REMOVE STALE LANG FILES (L1375-1380):
   • If language_mode != BOTH, remove opposite lang files

   C3. PICK BACKGROUND SLOT (L1382-1386):
   • If ad.background_slot: get_background_by_id()
   • Else: pick_background_slot() L431
     → Filter variants by format from background_variant.json (500 variants)
     → ensure_slot_tracker(): deterministic shuffle, cycle_number
     → Pop first from remaining[], append to used[]
     → Add default_text_overlay_treatment if missing

   C4. BUILD SEEDED BACKGROUND SENTENCE (L1388-1398):
   • bg_seed = ad.background_seed or random(seed + i*101)
   • build_seeded_background_sentence() L475:
     Random.Random(bg_seed).choice from each pool:
     → lighting (warm/soft/cool/ambient/natural/diffused/
       directional/morning golden/moody evening)
     → surface (wood/stone/marble/fabric/matte/linen/
       ceramic/concrete/neutral)
     → environment (indoor/studio/kitchen/dining/living/
       counter/desk/shelf/window)
     → mood (calm/clean/fresh/warm/focused/peaceful/
       premium/intentional/airy)
     → camera (eye-level/top-down/angled/isometric/close)
     → color_tone (warm beige/cool grey/soft peach/cream/
       muted earth/cool mint/warm neutral/soft sage)
     → composition (centered/left-right/diagonal/
       rule-of-thirds/pedestal/framed)
   • If visual_lock.seeded_background_direction → use that instead
   • If 9:16 → append "; maintain base scene identity..."

   C5. PICK VISUAL ARCHETYPE (L1400-1416):
   • selector_lang = first available language
   • forced_archetype = ad.visual_archetype or visual_lock.visual_archetype
   • pick_visual_archetype() — from FORMAT_VISUAL_ARCHETYPES:
     HERO: center_stage / left_copy_right_product / close_crop_pedestal / soft_lifestyle_frame
     BA: classic_split / soft_diagonal_transition / desk_to_discipline / emotion_to_control
     TEST: editorial_quote_card / portrait_overlay_card / minimal_review_poster / proof_strip_layout
     FEAT: bullet_panel / modular_cards / mechanism_steps / callout_annotations
     UGC: selfie_hold / desk_review / morning_routine / unboxing_reaction
   • Deduplicate across same-format ads: used_archetype_ids set

   C6. RENDER FULL PROMPT (L1419-1437):
   render_prompt() L854 — assembles 11 sections:

   ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ 1. PRODUCT LOCK BLOCK (L970-980):                               │
   │    "Use uploaded Obesity Killer packshots as absolute visual     │
   │    truth. Do not redesign/redraw/relabel. No reinterpretation."  │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 2. OUTPUT SPEC (L982-993):                                      │
   │    Canvas: 1080x1350 (4:5) or 1080x1920 (9:16). Style: {fmt}.   │
   │    Visual archetype: {id}. Full-bleed req. Low text, mobile-     │
   │    readable at 375px. All 5 products present. High contrast.     │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 3. FORMAT LAYOUT INSTRUCTIONS (L996-997):                       │
   │    base_layout_lines + visual_archetype.layout_lines             │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 4. PERSONA INPUT BLOCK (L999-1013):                             │
   │    Persona name/number, Pain, Desire, Friction, Proof needed,    │
   │    Tone cue, Awareness stage, Concept angle, Concept structure   │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 5. EXACT ON-IMAGE COPY (L1015-1017):                            │
   │    Format-specific rendering: HERO=headline+support+CTA,         │
   │    BA=headline+left/right bullets+CTA, FEAT=headline+bullets+    │
   │    CTA, TEST=headline+attribution+trust_line+CTA                 │
   │    "Render every character exactly. No paraphrasing."            │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 6. NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS (L1019-1039):                           │
   │    No redraw, no blur, no sale badges, no body transformations,  │
   │    no colors outside palette, max 2 font weights, no inset-      │
   │    canvas, no white panel behind products, no medical cure       │
   │    claims, no ring light/studio flash. BA: no BEFORE/AFTER words.│
   │                                                                  │
   │ 7. QUALITY BAR (L1041-1052):                                    │
   │    All 5 products present & unmodified. Text sharp at 375px.     │
   │    Labels accurate. Layout calm/premium. No clutter/hype.       │
   │    Single focal hierarchy. "If any fails, regenerate."           │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 8. VISUAL DIRECTION BLOCK (L1054-1089):                         │
   │    bg.id + bg.title, bg_seed, seeded_sentence, subject, action, │
   │    camera, lighting, props, surfaces, text panel treatment,      │
   │    edge color/structure control, mood, realism, visual_archetype │
   │    HERO anti-convergence rule. BA before/after anchors.          │
   │    If visual_lock: "VISUAL MATCH LOCK" + 9:16 conversion lock    │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 9. TYPOGRAPHY SHARPNESS BLOCK (L1090-1108):                    │
   │    Poppins Bold headline, Poppins Medium/Regular support/CTA.    │
   │    Readable at 375px. Forbidden: thin/script/decorative fonts,   │
   │    glow, outlines, drop shadows. Mandatory: crisp hard edges.    │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 10. SAFE-ZONE ENFORCEMENT (L536-554):                           │
   │    4:5: top 10% (0-135px), bottom 15% (1148-1350px),            │
   │    side edges 8% (0-86px, 994-1080px).                          │
   │    9:16: 14%-65% vertical band, lower 35% quiet space.          │
   │    "Reject if any crosses restricted zones."                    │
   │                                                                  │
   │ 11. 9:16 CONVERSION LOCK (if applicable, L557-570):             │
   │    Extend canvas vertically only, preserve 4:5 as fixed truth,   │
   │    no stretch/warp/zoom/crop, keep cluster at ~45% position.    │
   └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

   C7. VALIDATE PROMPT (L1119-1128):
   • Has "Background seed: {digits}" — regex check
   • Has "Seeded background direction (single sentence, exact):"
   • Has "SAFE-ZONE ENFORCEMENT" block
   • ≥45 non-empty lines
   → If any fails: RuntimeError

   C8. WRITE OUTPUT FILE (L1436):
   output/v{NN}/{45|96}/OUTPUT_{FORMAT}_P{NN}_{EN|HI}.txt

STEP D — REGISTRY UPDATE (L1439-1537):
• If --no-registry-write: skip
• Create entry dict with: id, timestamp, format, persona_number,
  persona_name, headline_angle, awareness_stage, concept_angle,
  concept_structure, visual_archetype, headline_en/hi, support_line
  en/hi, cta_en/hi, bullets_en/hi, background_slot, background_name,
  fresh_background_signature, language, output_quality, notes,
  opening_pattern_4tok_en/hi, copy_skeleton, hook_structure_class,
  proof_style_class, cta_voice_class, headline_word_count,
  has_protocol_mechanics, has_social_proof_number,
  background_scene_category, hypothesis_id, test_group,
  variant_variable, variant_value
• Append to registry["entries"]
• append_background_index() for rotation tracking
• append_concept_combo_index()
• add_used_text() for all copy fields
• write_json(REGISTRY_PATH)

→ Print: "Batch: v{NN}", "Seed: {seed}", "Wrote: output/v{NN}"

4:5 IMAGE GENERATION — Gemini Web
scripts/gemini_web_automation.py

Triggered from Dashboard:
/api/runs/{id}/generate-images-45
→ run_gemini_generation() L847

1. Discover prompt jobs from output/v{NN}/45/
   • --prompt-dir, --prompt-glob
   • Parse filename → Format + Persona

2. Chrome via Playwright:
   • Launch with CDP / attach debugger
   • navigate_to_fresh_chat() L667
     → goto about:blank → goto gemini.google.com/app
     → wait_for_manual_login() (dismiss overays)
     → URL Stability Lock: verify /app, no bubbles
     → find_composer() verified

3. For each prompt (per-prompt tab):
   a. Create new tab / reuse blank
   b. Navigate to fresh chat (SPA race guards)
   c. Upload reference images:
      → input/activeimages.txt or image_sources.txt
      → LIGHT_LOGO_URL, product packshots
      → Upload via file input, wait for settle
   d. set_prompt_text() L1134 — Multi-method:
      → Try keyboard paste (paste_prompt_via_keyboard)
      → Try clipboard paste (paste_prompt_via_clipboard)
      → Try JS injection (paste_prompt_via_js_last_resort)
   e. PROMPT INTEGRITY VERIFICATION (L1162-1173):
      → wait_for_prompt_integrity(): compare expected vs actual
      → MIN_INTEGRITY_RATIO = 0.98 (98% char match)
      → prefix match + suffix match + chunk sampling
      → If fails: try next insertion method
      → If all fail: PWTimeoutError, refuse to send
   f. Click Send button:
      → find_send_button() with click verification
      → Confirm message was sent (not still composing)
   g. Wait for generated image:
      → Poll for assistant response with large image
      → timeout=420s per prompt (configurable)
   h. Download image:
      → Click download button on generated response
      → Wait for file in download dir
      → MIN_IMAGE_BYTES = 20,000 (reject if smaller)
      → Wait for download completion (no .crdownload/.tmp)
      → sleep_after_download=3s
   i. Write per-image metadata JSON
      → path, job key, format, persona, timestamp

→ Output: generated_images/v{NN}/GEMINI_4_5/{fmt}/{persona}/*.png

9:16 IMAGE GENERATION (from 4:5)

Triggered from Dashboard:
/api/runs/{id}/generate-images-916-from-45
→ generate_916_for_run() L2623

1. LOAD COPY_BATCH.JSON (L2624-2632):
   • Read run_dir/context/copy_batch.json
   • manifest.batch for output folder

2. FORCE ASPECT RATIO (L2633):
   • force_aspect_ratio(copy_json, "9:16")
   → Set default_aspect_ratio="9:16"
   → Set every ad.aspect_ratio="9:16"
   → Adjust concept_structure if needed

3. COLLECT 4:5 VISUAL LOCKS (L2634-2636):
   collect_45_visual_locks(batch) L2668:
   → Read all OUTPUT_*_EN.txt from output/v{NN}/45/
   → Parse filename → {fmt, persona_number}
   → Read prompt text, extract:
     • Background slot ID + seed
       (parse_background_lock_from_prompt)
     • Visual lock fields:
       seeded_background_direction
       subject, action, camera, lighting
       props, surfaces, mood, realism
   → Key: "{fmt}::P{NN}"

4. APPLY VISUAL LOCKS (L2636):
   apply_visual_locks() L2712
   → For each ad in copy:
     • Match by {fmt}::{persona_number}
     • Inject: background_slot, background_seed
       visual_lock dict (all extracted fields)

5. SAVE 9:16 COPY BATCH (L2637-2638):
   → run_dir/context/copy_batch_916.json

6. RE-RUN GENERATE_ADS.PY (L2641-2654):
   → --copy-file copy_batch_916.json
   → --batch {same_batch}
   → --no-registry-write
   → --skip-uniqueness-check
   Writes output/v{NN}/96/OUTPUT_*_P*_EN.txt

7. COLLECT RESULT + MERGE MANIFEST (L2663-2665):
   → collect_run_result() → prompt files
   → merge_manifest() with generated_variant="9:16"

8. GENERATE 9:16 IMAGES (via Gemini):
   Same gemini_web_automation.py flow:
   → Prompt files in output/v{NN}/96/
   → Upload references, paste prompt with
     integrity check, send, wait, download
   → Output: generated_images/v{NN}/GEMINI_9_16/
     {fmt}/{persona}/*.png

ALTERNATE PATH — Kie Nano Banana Pro API:
scripts/kie_nano_batch.py
• Read prompt files from output/v{NN}/
• Prepend startingprompt.txt
• POST to Kie createTask API
• Poll for completion
• Download to generated_images/
• Per-image JSON metadata

FINAL OUTPUTS & REGISTRY

• AD_GENERATION_REGISTRY.JSON — full text dedup history
  → entries[], indexes (slot_exhaustion_tracker, background_index,
     concept_combo_index, used_text, mode)
• dashboard_storage/runs/run_{id}/manifest.json
  → prompt_files, image_files, llm_mode, context_source,
    context_extractor_model, image_sources_file, batch
• dashboard_storage/runs/run_{id}/logs/ — all error logs
• Dashboard UI endpoints:
  → GET /api/runs → list all runs
  → GET /api/runs/{id}/prompt-copies → view copy
  → Export/import on-image copy XLSX
  → GET /api/progress/{batch_key} → headless progress
  → POST /api/runs/{id}/regenerate-copy → edit + rerun LLM
  → POST /api/runs/{id}/reassemble-prompts → rerun assembly
  → POST /api/runs/{id}/edit-copy → manual copy edit

QUALITY CHECKS LEGEND (all forced, with line refs)

1. Copy payload validation ............. L596-637
   → Required fields per format, count check
2. Registry uniqueness check ........... L719 (gen_ads)
   → Exact match: headline, CTA, bullets, trust
3. In-batch duplicate detection ........ L1303-1313
   → Same-run text duplication blocker
4. Prompt structural validation ........ L1119-1128
   → ≥45 lines, background seed, safe-zone
5. Hypothesis mismatch check ........... L246-294
   → Classifiers: hook, proof, cta voice
6. CTA uniqueness enforcement .......... L1389-1416
   → Auto-replace with format pool
7. Internal marker scrubbing ........... L1307-1341
   → Price tokens, persona notes
8. Headline component name check ....... L655 (gen_ads)
   → No OK Liquid/Tab/Powder in headline
9. Gemini prompt integrity ............. L916-944
   → 98% character match before send
10. Image min bytes .................... 20,000
    → Reject undersized downloads
